definition: Information or data collected directly by website publishers or retailers about their site visitors or customers. GSTV can ingest client 1st party data for targeting.
Data acquired from sources GSTV does not have a direct relationship with for data collection. Aggregated and published data used for targeting ads and marketing messages.
Automatic content recognition — identification technology to recognize content played on a media device.
Currently installed location that is playing video and returning playback data.
Legacy data management company connecting anonymized 1st party data to GSTV exposure for measuring campaign impact on lift in sales or custom KPIs.
Appears next to preferred content. Can also refer to conflicting advertisements preceding or following another piece.
Play data with exact timestamp associated with each play. Requested via the Data Engineering team.
Central decisioning stack for creative rotation pacing tracking and priority. Can host a unified auction/mediation.
Ad-Supported Video-On-Demand — free platforms and subscription streaming services that serve ads.
GSTV Order Management System (OMS) for proposal creation and inventory management.
Products/services bonused to an advertiser to incentivize a buy such as tags research studies share of voice or additional impressions.
Household-level targeting across MVPDs/CTVs using privacy-safe IDs and frequency management.
Legacy competitive advertising information provider. Replaced by MediaRadar.
Cryptographic signing to authenticate ad requests for supply chain integrity. Also known as Authenticated Connections.
Umbrella term for CTV addressable shoppable/interactive formats and data-driven delivery across screens.
Events held at local agencies or holding company headquarters to deepen relationships and showcase offerings.
Legacy online subscription service for obtaining data client lists used for mapping. Replaced by Retail Stat.
Site content and performance management platform used by Gilbarco for Applause media orders on non-ICS FPIV hardware.
Attribution measurement of a campaign incremental impact on app downloads.
Predominantly 10-inch pump screen on Gilbarco dispensers. Transaction or loop-based depending on hardware. Platforms include FlexPay II, FPIV, FP6.
Authorized Service Organization/Company — technicians who install and service fuel dispensers and payment hardware.
Video or image provided by a client or retailer for content or creative production.
Internal unique number assigned by Vistar to every asset uploaded regardless of play status. Also called creative ID.
Data analysis connecting individual campaign exposure to actual sales or conversions using anonymized aggregated personal data.
People or market segment targeted by an advertising message or campaign.
Amount of content that can be transmitted over a network at a given time.
Share of auctions lost to late or no responses. Latency KPI for DSPs.
Advertiser sponsoring a segment of content with a brand logo on intro/outro screens.
Metric quantifying relative performance of a brand within specified customer groups. BDI = (% Market Brand Sales / % Market Population) x 100.
Rules that define how a brand should look sound and be presented including approved logos colors fonts imagery and tone of voice.
Measures branding impact of an ad on consumers awareness opinion and purchase intent. MFour is GSTV preferred partner.
Short video segment (3-5 seconds) letting a customer know they are watching GSTV programming at the pump.
Abbreviation for convenience store.
Planned series of advertisements unified by a single theme or idea used across various media to achieve a specific marketing goal.
Web based subscription software providing mapping solutions for GSTV locations and advertiser proximity data.
Metric quantifying sales performance of a category in a specific group compared to all consumers. CDI = (% Market Category Sales / % Market Population) x 100.
Overview document or slides outlining the success of a campaign run on the GSTV network.
Casual Dining Restaurant (e.g. Chipotle Panera Applebees). Sites can restrict CDR ads from their location.
Services and products available at a given gas station such as lottery car wash ATM.
When an advertiser chooses specific stations versus a full market. Less than a full DMA results in higher CPMs.
Formerly IRI — leading provider of UPC scanner-based business solutions in CPG. GSTV uses Circana to measure lift in CPG product sales.
GSTV data provider for qualitative targeting profiles using PRIZM geodemographic segments and Claritas 360 targeting system.
Finance term showing the number that represents Booked Revenue plus Pipeline. Also known as Completion with Pipeline.
Assessment of a client needs and marketing objectives to uncover a problem where GSTV can offer a solution.
Marketing team handling seller partnership and requests such as RFPs proactive pitches and EBRs. Formerly Marketing Solutions.
Operational tolerance windows for schedule vs system time to prevent playback misses in DOOH.
Video up to 30 seconds created to promote GSTV proprietary brands such as IGNITE Octane Amplify or Programmatic.
L Bar or wrap on screen graphic surrounding programming content usually containing sponsor information.
3rd party syndicated data source for cross platform measurement and targeting. Used to measure tune-in and web conversion lift.
TV set connected to the internet through built-in capability or through another device such as Blu-ray player game console or set-top box.
Targeting GSTV stations within 1-15 mile radius of client competitors to sway consumers to take action with client.
Opportunity for advertisers to create custom content by hand picking screen subject matter from content partners. AKA Branded/Co-Branded Content.
Third-party entity that produces content to air on GSTV. Includes Big Machine Label Group Blossom La Liga Live Nation and others.
GSTV media experience where media runs at all times and is maximized to full screen while fuel is being dispensed.
Cross-DOOH/CTV frequency capping and pacing to reduce overexposure.
Consumer Packaged Goods such as Snickers Gatorade Advil.
Cost Per Thousand Impressions — cost to deliver 1000 viewers. Formula: CPM = (Cost x 1000) / Total Impressions.
Location-based measurement company measuring foot traffic lift and providing consumer analysis.
Standard time periods of the broadcast day. Includes ability to specify different times of day for an ad to air.
Demand Side Platform — platform which digital buyers use to manage programmatic buying across multiple ad exchanges.
Longer-form video up to four minutes used primarily for internal purposes to demonstrate the full GSTV experience.
Designated Market Area — term created by Nielsen to identify an exclusive geographic area of counties. 210 DMAs in the United States.
Alternative way to activate a Direct IO campaign. Flexible spreading out impressions across targeted locations with dynamic pacing.
Industry term for advanced fuel pump usually at a gas station offering multiple fuel types. Screen Count = 2X Dispenser Count in most cases.
One of the world leading manufacturers of fuel dispensers. DFS MPD Models with GSTV: Ovation and Helix.
Legacy GSTV proprietary pump-top hardware and video network introduced in 2005 — no longer operational.
Amount of time the consumer spends during a gasoline transaction.
Cloud-based site content and performance management platform used by Dover/Wayne/DFS.
Automated strategy using buying pattern recognition to constantly adjust price floors.
Automated pacing scheduling based on demand audience and data triggers. Supports dayparting and geo rules.
Europay Mastercard Visa — global standard for smart payment cards with embedded microchips.
Site content and performance management platform used by Dover/Wayne/DFS for InOvationTV — sunset December 2025.
GSTV larger partnerships/spenders with dedicated team members across AdOps IGNITE Insights Solutions and Sales Planning.
Established internal framework to drive repeatable scalable process to defend and grow enterprise accounts.
Paid opportunity where GSTV aligns with an external event to gain exposure branding and engagement.
Content with no expiration date or reference to time allowing rotation into the programming loop as filler.
Private Marketplace deal with no end date.
Interactive site content/transaction software by Gilbarco/GVR/Invenco. Versions include FlexPay 6 with 15 inch 9 inch and 5 inch screens.
Attribution measurement of campaign exposure impact on in-store visits using location tracking and geo-fencing.
Area of the gas station outside the c-store where consumers actively pump gas.
Formerly PLACED — leader in location analytics and visitation measurement.
Number of times a consumer is exposed to a specific advertisement. GSTV viewers are exposed approximately once every four minutes.
Buying all available open markets per month quarter semi-annual or annual.
GSTV custom-built infrastructure tool for site data playlist management media distribution and proof of play — being phased out.
Web based subscription tool converting addresses to latitude and longitude for mapping purposes.
Method of determining physical location of a viewer and delivering content based on that location.
GSTV primary deck to showcase capabilities and strengths to agencies/brands for first meetings.
One of the world largest fuel dispenser manufacturers. MPD Models with GSTV: Encore 300 500 700. Also known as Invenco.
Amount needed to reach one Goal or Plan or the amount exceeding it. Found in Salesforce reporting.
Team handling go-to-market and overarching category deliverables.
Gross Rating Point/Target Rating Point — sum of ratings delivered by media properties where ratings represent % of target audience.
Deals optimizing toward visits or other outcomes.
GSTV media experience starting at beginning of fueling transaction ending when nozzle is returned to dispenser.
Content management system for Sales and Marketing teams to find best-performing content for each opportunity.
GSTV in-house creative and content studio responsible for content partner relationships and creating ads/RPAs.
Network-Validated Impression — measurement of inventory referring to a view of an advertisement. In GSTV case impression = transaction.
Different clients GSTV has worked with typically bucketed by category.
Form of percentage relating numbers to a base with the average being 100. Above 100 is above average.
Emerging leader in location analytics and visitation measurement.
GSTV product from collaboration with Dover Fueling Systems. 10-12 inch screens embedded into Wayne Ovation Ovation2 and Helix dispensers.
Formal request and paperwork to purchase media space.
Gilbarco cloud-based media platform for Applause TV.
Unit of advertising available on a media network. GSTV has multiple 15 or 30 second units within any programming loop for sale.
Revenue-driven method of maximizing full potential of inventory through strategic allocation of impressions.
EMV-compliant payment terminal by Dover Fueling Systems available as retrofit on all dispensers regardless of manufacturer.
Quantifiable measure used to evaluate the performance of a marketing/media plan.
Top tier brands/clients for Sales.
Animated bar shaped like sideways L surrounding a brand spot for the entire length leveraged for awareness or calls-to-action.
Auction KPI factoring response latency into win probability. Flags throttling and timeouts.
Older no longer operational technology system once capable of delivering GSTV media. Examples: DTV O&O PetroTV SPP.
Measurement of how a campaign impacts a key metric. Lift = percent change for exposed users vs matched control group.
Television programming distributed through cable satellite or broadcast networks including Video on Demand.
Cycle of media files scheduled for any given dispenser. Duration is capped within Vistar software.
On screen product displaying most recent lottery jackpot amounts.
Free ad or extension offered to make good on an ad that ran incorrectly or if a campaign under delivered impressions.
Document containing list of all DMAs station/screen count and impression estimates for the network. Updated monthly.
Marketing team handling press events swag website and social media.
Marketing team handling GSTV brand design such as brand assets deck templates and product mocks.
Major flagship event for GSTV — high investment high visibility strategically important. Examples: Possible IAB NewFronts Cannes Lions.
Marketing piece outlining basic company information.
MediaMark Research and Intelligence — leading provider of media and consumer research. GSTV uses GfK MRI Doublebase survey.
Leading provider of competitive advertising information. GSTV has access to national and local market media spend data.
Server-side framework normalizing priority floor prices and auction rules across multiple SSPs and/or direct paths.
Mobile research vendor for brand studies connecting GSTV with a panel of 2.5 million consumers.
Major Oil Company — used interchangeably with fuel brand like ExxonMobil BP/Amoco Shell.
Example creative for a proactive or RFP pitch that is static not moving.
Manufacturer of payment technology (now NCR Voyix/Atleos). NCR and Invenco have a long-standing partnership.
Internal GSTV team monitoring site performance managing station inventory service requests and handling outages.
Leading global information and measurement company enabling companies to understand consumers and consumer behavior.
Nielsen TV/GfK MRI data fusion combining National People Meter and Survey of the American Consumer data.
Cross-platform media planning system GSTV uses to demonstrate added reach to clients media plans.
GSTV data-driven audience targeting product linking station visitation to real-world and web-based behaviors.
Advanced programmatic advertising standard with richer contextual and audience signals. Versions 2.5 and 2.6.
Order Management System for building proposals and managing available inventory. Source of truth for sellable supply.
Outdoor Payment Terminal — used by hardware partners to describe a screen pump or fueling point.
Specific type of screen hardware compatible with GSTV.
Over-The-Top — any app or web service content delivered over the open internet including AVOD/FAST Roku Apple TV etc.
Standard industry term meaning operator of gas station is also the owner. Also a legacy GSTV pump-top TV network no longer operational.
List in Salesforce showing sales opportunities and activity by sales person.
Sequence of media files to be displayed on a screen at a gas station.
Point-of-Sale — combination of hardware and software for processing sales managing transactions tracking inventory.
Study measuring campaign efficacy by evaluating point-of-sale transactions via retailer data.
Measuring brand impact before and after media runs to evaluate incrementality value. Requires client first party data.
Curated inventory invite-only supply with negotiated floors. Most PMPs are first price auction.
Offerings with technical capabilities for a specific client KPI including tags weather triggers and L-bars.
Automated ad buying across SSP/DSP/ad-server ecosystems with unified auctions and real-time optimization.
Former GSTV product name now called Direct Flex.
Guaranteed deals with negotiated CPMs executed via DSP/SSP with automation of programmatic plus IO-like certainty.
Automation layer across linear and connected TV using data-driven targeting audience guarantees and real-time decisioning.
Content that is not ads or promos used to entertain or inform the viewer.
Summary report provided to advertiser containing impressions summary proof of play and photos of ad running.
Message from network partner indicating a video associated with a campaign has been viewed and counts as an impression.
Document created by Sales/Sales Planning containing a campaign recommendation for an advertiser.
Quick Service Restaurant (e.g. McDonalds Taco Bell). Sites can restrict QSR ads.
Document outlining GSTV rates for 15 and 30 second spots by market and full network with component pricing.
Percent average audience of a universe of households or target audiences viewing a program during an average minute.
Total number of different or unique people or households exposed at least once to a medium during a given period.
Best-proven approach to cold calling — explain research completed regarding client business and benefits of meeting.
Selling projected unfulfilled inventory to select clients as a bulk/low CPM buy to drive revenue.
Denotes types of ads that cannot be displayed at a given gas station. Over 25 defined category restrictions in use.
Gas station or convenience store owner operator or management entity. May also be a retail partner contracted with GSTV.
Portion of contractual loop length reserved exclusively for retailer promotions or retailer-sold advertising.
Retailer Promotional Advertisement — monthly network inventory allotted to fuel retailers to promote their own brand products and services.
Attributing profit and revenue growth to impact of marketing initiatives. ROI = Profit from Ads / Cost of Ads.
Marketing KPI showing revenue per dollar spent. ROAS = Revenue from Ad / Cost of Ad.
Requesting a Request for Proposal response for an upcoming campaign.
Multiple ad units rotating within one slot of advertising space within the programming loop (up to 4 ads).
Attribution measurement of incremental sales attributed to a specific campaign.
Category-specific opportunities aligned with consumer behavior and industry cycles such as Super Bowl or Halloween.
Legacy media network previously operated by GSTV in partnership with Gilbarco — no longer operational.
Cycle through media files scheduled for any given dispenser. See also Loop.
Web interface in gBase used to view and maintain site venue information.
6-character internal GSTV identification number assigned to each gas station. Example: DTG001 = Detroit 1 Gilbarco.
Data point describing current state of a GSTV location. Statuses: Active Temporarily Offline Awaiting Installation Awaiting Reactivation Deactivated Cancelled.
Short high-impact video (45-60 seconds) showcasing GSTV strongest work across advertising content and audience reach.
GSTV programming slate of content consisting of GSTV Originals and GSTV Exclusives.
Senior Leadership Team.
Share of Voice — percentage of times an ad will be scheduled within loops. 200% = twice as many plays, 50% = every other loop.
GSTV Media managed service curated specifically for fuel retailer Speedway. Operates on ICS Speedway Single Tenant.
Likelihood that the difference in conversion rates between a variation and baseline is not due to random chance.
Subscription Video-On-Demand — subscription streaming service without serving ads.
Supply-Side Platform — software allowing publishers to automate management sale and optimization of ad inventory.
General market data collected from various sources including retail sales data and consumer surveys.
5-second audio/video extensions to an advertiser spot designed to drive a particular KPI. Types: Action Offer Location Proximity.
Nielsen IQ paid service offering store location data market size performance benchmarking and consumer insights.
7-digit unique identifier assigned to an individual business location by NIQ TDLinx service.
Site where Proof of Performance has been temporarily deactivated due to mechanical/power issues. Still part of network but not for sale.
High-impact cross-team initiatives aligned with GSTV core value props including Summer of Drive and Holiday Rush.
Unit of measurement representing when a consumer makes a purchase at a venue. Historically a transaction equaled an impression.
Attribution measurement of campaign incremental impact on household tune-in for an advertised show.
Video ad spending committed in advance including spending from TV upfronts and IAB Digital Content NewFronts.
Term Vistar uses for a GSTV site.
Ad serving platform used to deliver pace and measure both direct and programmatic campaigns.
Prior to ICS Applause TV starts playing content only after consumer begins transaction. Idle content plays when not in transaction mode.
Product that automatically activates or adjusts a brand messaging based on weather conditions.
Attribution measurement of campaign incremental impact on advertiser web traffic.
Media program through which fuel suppliers establish agreement for GSTV media like inOvationTV with Marathon.
